Lake Creek 2nd Ward

Youth Fundraiser Fiesta!

A Taco Bar Dinner, Dessert Auction & Night of Laughs

🎐 Friday, March 6th at 6:00 PM 🎐

Scroll to learn more

Walking With Christ

The Lake Creek 2nd Ward Youth Program is dedicated to bringing the youth closer to Jesus Christ—helping them build their testimonies, invite Him into their daily lives, and walk with Him in faith.

Through meaningful activities, service, and fellowship, the youth develop spiritual strength, lasting friendships, and the confidence to be a light in the world. Your support of this fundraiser directly funds their upcoming activities and events throughout the year.

Come join us for an unforgettable evening of delicious food, hilarious entertainment, and the joy of supporting the next generation!

What’s Happening?

📅 Event Information

📆 Date: Friday, March 6th, 2026

🕐 Time: 6:00 PM

📍 Location: Iordachescu Residence — 8681 E Lake Creek Rd, Heber City, UT 84032

Join the entire Lake Creek 2nd Ward family for a spectacular evening celebrating and supporting our amazing youth! This will be an evening filled with incredible food, hilarious entertainment, and the warmth of our ward community coming together for a wonderful cause.

Dress festively—sombreros and colorful outfits are highly encouraged! The youth will be decked out in traditional Mexican attire including sombreros and beautiful Mexican dresses, setting the tone for a true fiesta.

🗺 Get Directions

🌮 The Taco Bar

Get ready for a mouthwatering Mexican feast! Our taco bar will feature a delicious spread where you and your family can build your dream tacos from a fantastic selection of meats, fresh toppings, salsas, and all the fixings.

Whether you like your tacos loaded with everything or simple and classic, there will be something for everyone—including the pickiest of eaters!

Pricing:

$8 per person $35 per family
💛 Everyone is invited! If cost is a concern, please come and join us anyway. We want everyone there! 💛

💰 Payment: Please plan to pay at the event. We accept cash or check (checks made out to the Church). Thank you!

💚 The Fundraiser

All proceeds from this evening go directly to the Ward Youth Funds—designed to bring the youth closer to Jesus Christ, help them invite Him into their daily lives, build their testimonies, and walk with Christ.

🍰 Dessert Auction: The talented youth have prepared an amazing selection of favorite desserts and pastries that will be auctioned off to the highest bidder. Get ready for some friendly bidding wars over delicious treats!

These funds will support the upcoming Ward Youth Activity and other activities throughout the year. Every dollar helps create meaningful experiences that strengthen the youth’s faith and fellowship.

💖 Additional Donations: We are happy to accept any additional donations that will go directly to supporting the youth program. Every contribution, big or small, makes a difference!

💰 Payment: All dinner payments and donations can be made at the event by cash or check (checks made out to the Church). Thank you for your generosity!

🤝 Youth Service

The heart of this evening is our incredible youth! They’ve been looking forward to serving the ward family and making this a night to remember.

From greeting you at the door to serving up tacos, refilling drinks, and making sure every family feels welcome, our youth will be hands-on all evening long. This is their chance to show their love and gratitude for the ward that supports them.

Come ready to connect — sit with the youth, hear about their goals and testimonies, and enjoy the energy they bring to everything they do. This evening is about building relationships and strengthening our ward family together.

Walking Together in Faith

The youth walking with Christ in every part of their lives

Words of Inspiration

“
“Jesus beckons to each of us, ‘Come, follow me’ and ‘walk with me.’ I testify that as we press forward in faith and walk in the meekness of the Lord’s Spirit, we are blessed with power, guidance, protection and peace.”
Elder David A. BednarQuorum of the Twelve Apostles — “Abide in Me, and I in You; Therefore Walk With Me,” April 2023 General Conference
“
“As we genuinely and continually strive to learn of the Savior and follow His example, I promise you, in His name, that His divine attributes will be written in our minds and hearts, that we will become more like Him and that we will walk with Him.”
Elder Ulisses SoaresQuorum of the Twelve Apostles — “In Awe of Christ and His Gospel,” April 2022 General Conference
“
“My dear extraordinary youth, you were sent to earth at this precise time, the most crucial time in the history of the world. … There is nothing happening on this earth right now that is more important than that.”
President Russell M. Nelson“Hope of Israel” Worldwide Youth Broadcast, June 2018
❤️

Every Gift Makes a Difference

We gratefully accept additional donations to the Ward Youth Funds. Your generosity helps create life-changing experiences that bring the youth closer to Jesus Christ and strengthen their testimonies. Thank you for investing in the next generation!

💰 Please pay for dinner and donations at the event with cash or check (checks made out to the Church).
